summary: P4 autopilot SSE loop tested via httpx ASGITransport with monkeypatched _run_code_review. All 56 backend tests pass (50 regression + 6 new P4) + 1 skip preserved. Frontend loads cleanly; static code review confirms useInlineDomain hook extraction, STICK_TO_BOTTOM_THRESHOLD_PX module-level constant, all required autopilot data-testids, and file size compliance (ProjectRow.jsx 481 lines, AutopilotDialog.jsx 329 lines).

minor.issue: Pydantic V1 .dict() call deprecated — use .model_dump() (warning only, not failing)

action_items: Optional cleanup: migrate ChatSession/ChatMessage `.dict()` calls in _create_fix_review_chat to `.model_dump()` to silence Pydantic V2 deprecation warnings.
critical_code_review_comments: AutopilotDialog SSE consumer uses fetch+ReadableStream (correct — EventSource cannot POST). Verified file exists and is wired in ProjectRow.jsx.
_autopilot_stream guarantees `loop_error` is always emitted on missing project / exception (matches the 404 spec scenario).
Gate logic correctly checks `verdict == 'do_not_ship' and not bypass_review`; ship/ship_with_fixes verdicts pass through.
ai_autopilot passes user_id=None (correct — AI surface has no user context); op_autopilot passes user.get('sub') so fix_chat_session_id can be seeded.
deploy_projects_ext.py is 1627 lines — approaching size limit; consider splitting autopilot SSE block + code review block into separate submodules in a future refactor.
test_credentials: Operator rac.investments.swe@gmail.com / REDACTED — not used by P4 tests (we override get_current_operator via app.dependency_overrides).
seed_data_creation: Two deploy_projects rows seeded: autopilot-test-blocked (verdict=do_not_ship), autopilot-test-ship (verdict=ship). Cleaned up in module-scope teardown along with any 'Fix review:' chat sessions/messages.
context_for_next_testing_agent: P4 backend tests use httpx ASGITransport + module-scoped event loop (pytest.mark.asyncio(loop_scope='module')) because motor's mongo client binds to the first loop. If extending, keep pytestmark and per-test loop_scope='module' decorators in sync. _run_code_review is monkeypatched to read `_verdict_for_test` from the seeded doc — set that field to control the branch. The Authorization-Bearer 401 path returns regular HTTP (not SSE) because FastAPI runs Depends() before invoking the StreamingResponse handler.
rca of the issue: N/A — no bugs found. Initial test attempt with the live supervisor backend failed because module-level monkeypatch of deploy_projects_ext._run_code_review only affects the pytest process, not the running uvicorn worker; switching to in-process ASGITransport (httpx.AsyncClient) made monkeypatching effective. Second iteration hit 'Event loop is closed' RuntimeError from motor — fixed by binding all async fixtures + tests to a single module-scoped loop via pytest-asyncio's loop_scope='module'.
